final_prompt.prompt:
Create a concept art illustration of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "赛博朋克" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Blade Runner film production design, Akira anime background art, Ghost in the Shell (1995) cyberpunk visual tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include towering skyscrapers, neon lights flickering, flying cars weaving through buildings
Scene/backdrop: must include a futuristic cityscape at night with acid rain falling from the sky, puddles on the ground reflecting lights
Lighting/mood: needs a tech-meets-decay atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be blue-purple dominant
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
